title: Jamaican Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy Jamaican-inspired dish featuring marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together jerk seasoning, olive oil, and a pinch of salt.
Add the chicken, onion, bell pepper, zucchini, and cherry tomatoes to the bowl. Toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated vegetables and chicken onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with your favorite herbs or a sprinkle of jerk seasoning.
